message:
feat(layout,svg): add sequence diagram activation bar rendering

Implement activation bars for sequence diagrams — the narrow rectangles
on participant lifelines that show when a participant is actively
processing a message.

Layout (fm-layout):
- Add LayoutActivationBar struct (participant_index, depth, bounds)
- Add activation_bars field to LayoutExtensions
- Sequence layout now computes activation bar geometry from
  IrSequenceMeta.activations, using message y-positions for start/end
  and depth-based horizontal offset for nested activations

SVG renderer (fm-render-svg):
- Render activation bars as filled rectangles with node_fill/node_stroke
- CSS class fm-activation-bar for styling
- Nested activations get fm-activation-nested class
- Bars rendered after lifeline bands, before clusters

The parser already extracts activation data from +/- message modifiers
and explicit activate/deactivate statements. This completes the
parse → layout → render pipeline for activation bars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
